description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6 Docker image with a postgres:latest service and caches the .cache directory. Define variables GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY, PIPENV_CACHE_DIR, PIP_CACHE_DIR, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_HOST, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, and POSTGRES_USER as shown. Add a test job (default test stage) that runs pip install pipenv, then pipenv sync --dev, and finally pipenv run pytest. The job uses the defined cache and variables and has no special rules or artifacts.
